nodes.context: Russian organized crime syndicate, involved in money laundering and other criminal activities.
Italian organized crime syndicate based in Campania.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New York City.

edges.evidence_quote: According to FBI reports, Mogilevich had alliances with the Camorra, in particular with Salvatore De Falco, a lower-echelon member of the Giuliano clan.
edges.context: Mogilevich, who had ties to Solntsevskaya Bratva, had alliances with the Camorra.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1998, an FBI informant told the bureau that one of Mogilevich's chief lieutenants in Los Angeles met two Russians from New York City with Genovese crime family ties to broker a scheme to dump American toxic waste in Russia or Ukraine.
edges.context: Mogilevich's associate met with Genovese crime family members to arrange a toxic waste dumping scheme.
